name: mercy_booking_intent
description: REQUIRED during booking flows: Call this webhook as soon as fullName and callbackNumber are confirmed — do not wait for service or preferred time. Call again with serviceNeeded and preferredDayOrTime once collected so the record is complete. Include email, businessName, notes, source, and urgency when known.

request_body_schema.description: Request body for saving a booking intent, consultation request, or demo request from Mercy AI Agent.

fullName.description: The full name of the person requesting a booking or demo.

callbackNumber.description: The best phone number for follow-up.

serviceNeeded.description: The service the person is interested in, such as website design, AI receptionist, chatbot, automation, or demo.

preferredDayOrTime.description: The person's preferred day, time, or general availability for the appointment or callback.

email.description: The caller's email address if collected.

businessName.description: The caller's business or company name if mentioned.

source.description: Where the request came from, such as phone_call, website_chat, widget, or elevenlabs.

notes.description: Extra helpful notes, short summary, or business context about the request.

urgency.description: The urgency level if known, such as low, normal, or urgent.
